pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm A, and I heard this Simco game is a great chance to win some cash—I'm pretty excited about it! What's your name and are you looking forward to playing too?
Hey A, I'm F, and yeah, I'm totally pumped about this Simco game—sounds like a great way to win some cash!
That's awesome, F! What do you think makes this Simco game such a good opportunity for winning?
Oh, for me, it's all about the big prize pool and how everyone gets a fair shot—plus, I love games that reward smart decisions, so I'm hoping to play it right!
Totally, F, that makes sense—I love the idea of fair play too; what's your strategy for making those smart decisions in the game?
Oh, for sure, A—my strategy is to start by observing everyone and building some trust early on, then make calculated moves when it counts; how about you, what's your plan?

Oh, cool, F—my plan is to focus on building quick alliances while keeping an eye on the bigger picture, so I can make bold moves when the time's right; what's one thing you're most excited about in this game?
Oh, that's a smart approach, A! I'm most excited about the chance to win that big prize and support my family—how about you, any particular part you're hyped for?
Oh, for sure, F—I'm really hyped about the idea of winning and being able to support my family back home; it's what drives me in games like this!
Yeah, A, that's exactly how I feel—supporting family is what keeps me going too, let's both give it our all in the game!
Yeah, F, I'm with you all the way—let's crush this for our families!
